description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in heavy, fur-lined winter attire, suitable for cold climates. The individual wears a long, thick coat with decorative trim and fringe, layered over practical pants and sturdy boots. Their face is marked with striking face paint, and their hair is styled in long braids. They carry a large, woven backpack filled with supplies and fur, and hold a long spear in one hand, suggesting a preparedness for survival or hunting. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, with accessories such as a belt, pouches, and gloves enhancing the functional look.
description: A heavily clothed adult with braided hair, face paint, a large fur-lined coat, backpack, and spear, exuding a rugged, survivalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face paint, braided hair, detailed coat, and spear held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, fur-topped backpack and the full length of the spear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the woven backpack, fur details, and the back of the coat with fringe.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the figure, the spear, and the side of the backpack.
attribute_clothing_type: long fur-lined winter coat, practical pants, gloves, and utility belt with pouches
